robots.name: Regex Tester
robots.description: Live match highlighting, flags, groups, replace mode, explain mode, 24 common patterns, cheatsheet.

robots.name: JSON Formatter
robots.description: Beautify, minify, validate, tree view, JSONPath, diff two JSONs, convert to YAML/CSV/TypeScript types.

robots.name: Base64 & Encoders
robots.description: Base64, URL, HTML entities, hex, binary, ROT13. File mode with image preview. Bidirectional.

robots.name: Hash Generator
robots.description: MD5, SHA-1/256/384/512 simultaneously. File hashing, HMAC, password strength analyzer.

robots.name: UUID Generator
robots.description: UUID v4/v7, ULID, nanoid, CUID, ObjectId. Bulk 1-100, parse, custom alphabet.

robots.name: Diff Checker
robots.description: Side-by-side text diff. Character/word/line modes, inline view, ignore whitespace.

robots.name: Cron Parser
robots.description: Human-readable cron descriptions, next 10 runs, visual builder, 15 presets.

robots.name: JWT Decoder
robots.description: Decode header + payload, verify HMAC signature, check expiration, generate tokens.

robots.name: Color Converter
robots.description: Hex/RGB/HSL/HSB/CMYK/named. All formats at once, contrast check, shades, harmonies.

robots.name: Timestamp Converter
robots.description: Unix timestamp, 16 timezones, date math, countdown, relative time, epoch milestones.
